title: Podcast Interviewing Masterclass
description: A 90-minute conversation that the listener remembers for years.
summary_pt_br: Mestria em entrevista: leia 3 melhores, 5 perguntas essenciais, não cite de volta, aguente silêncio, siga o quase-dito.

scenes.subtitle_en: A 90-minute conversation that the listener remembers for years.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Mestria em entrevista: leia 3 melhores, 5 perguntas essenciais, não cite de volta, aguente silêncio, siga o quase-dito.

scenes.text_en: A 90-minute conversation that the listener remembers for years. Focus: podcast interviewing masterclass. Read their three best pieces — everything else is homework.
scenes.text_pt: Mestria em entrevista: leia 3 melhores, 5 perguntas essenciais, não cite de volta, aguente silêncio, siga o quase-dito. Foco: podcast interviewing masterclass. Leia os 3 melhores — o resto é dever.

scenes.title: Podcast Interviewing Masterclass
scenes.body_en: Master interview craft: read the guest's three best pieces. Prepare five questions you'd regret not asking. Never quote them back. Hold silence. Follow the sentence that almost came out.
scenes.body_pt: Mestria em entrevista: leia 3 melhores, 5 perguntas essenciais, não cite de volta, aguente silêncio, siga o quase-dito.

examples.en: Read their three best pieces — everything else is homework.
examples.pt: Leia os 3 melhores — o resto é dever.

examples.en: Five questions you'd regret not asking. That's the list.
examples.pt: Cinco perguntas que se arrependeria de não fazer.

examples.en: Follow the sentence that almost came out of their mouth.
examples.pt: Siga a frase que quase saiu.

exercise.question: Complete: "Read their three best pieces — ___ else is homework."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "Read their three best pieces — everything else is homework."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Leia os 3 melhores — o resto é dever.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: Five questions you'd regret not asking. That's the list.
I haven't heard anything about that.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "Five questions you'd regret not asking. That's the list."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Cinco perguntas que se arrependeria de não fazer.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Podcast Interviewing Masterclass — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre podcast interviewing masterclass. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Never quote them back at them.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Follow the sentence that almost came out.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Master interviews are listening made visible.

scenes.title: The 90-minute conversation
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe five masterclass interview principles. Use at least three interviewing terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Before her hundredth podcast episode, Zara walked a young journalist through the craft that had taken her a decade to learn.

paragraphs.speaker: Zara
paragraphs.en: Read their three best pieces before the interview — everything else is homework you do before you deserve this conversation.

paragraphs.speaker: Journalist
paragraphs.en: And prepare five questions you'd regret not asking — that's the list, not twenty questions you might use if convenient.

paragraphs.speaker: Zara
paragraphs.en: Never quote them back at them — they said it the best way they could the first time, and you can't improve on that.

paragraphs.speaker: Journalist
paragraphs.en: Hold silence three seconds longer than feels comfortable — and follow the sentence that almost came out, always.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Master interviewing, Zara believed, is listening made visible — the one craft where speaking less is always doing more.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Podcast Interviewing Masterclass". A 90-minute conversation that the listener remembers for years. Read their three best pieces — everything else is homework. Five questions you'd regret not asking. That's the list. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Podcast Interviewing Masterclass". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
check.explanation: She says the title: "Podcast Interviewing Masterclass".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Podcast Interviewing Masterclass".

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
